member.name: P:mymooo.core.Account.MymoooContext`1.ServiceProvider
member.summary: Defines a mechanism for retrieving a service object; that is, an object that provides custom support to other objects.

member.name: M:mymooo.core.Cache.RedisCache.HashDelete``1(StackExchange.Redis.RedisKey,StackExchange.Redis.RedisValue[])
member.summary: жү№йҮҸеҲ йҷӨ ж №жҚ®hash key еҲ йҷӨеҜ№еә”зҡ„еӯ—ж®өеҖј

member.returns: е…ій”®еӯ—

member.returns: е…ій”®еӯ—

member.name: M:mymooo.core.Utils.Script.MymoooRegex.ChineseLanguage
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]+
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [\u4E00-\u9FA5] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:mymooo.core.Utils.Script.MymoooRegex.Email
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\w+([-+.]\\w+)*@\\w+([-.]\\w+)*\\.\\w+([-.]\\w+)*$
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match if at the beginning of the string.
в—Ӣ Match a word character greedily at least once.
в—Ӣ Loop greedily any number of times.
в—Ӣ 1st capture group.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [+-.].
в—Ӣ Match a word character atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ Match '@'.
в—Ӣ Match a word character greedily at least once.
в—Ӣ Loop greedily any number of times.
в—Ӣ 2nd capture group.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [-.].
в—Ӣ Match a word character atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ Match '.'.
в—Ӣ Match a word character greedily at least once.
в—Ӣ Loop greedily any number of times.
в—Ӣ 3rd capture group.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [-.].
в—Ӣ Match a word character atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:mymooo.core.Utils.Script.MymoooRegex.AssemblyVersion
member.remarks:
Pattern:
, Version=[0-9.]+
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match the string ", Version=".
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [.0-9] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:mymooo.core.Utils.Script.MymoooRegex.DecimalRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[0-9]+([.]{1}[0-9]+){0,1}
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match if at the beginning of the string.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [0-9] greedily at least once.
в—Ӣ Optional (greedy).
в—Ӣ 1st capture group.
в—Ӣ Match '.'.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [0-9] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:mymooo.core.Utils.Script.MymoooRegex.ExtractDecimalRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\d+[.]\\d+
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ Match '.'.
в—Ӣ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.

member.name: M:mymooo.core.Utils.Script.MymoooRegex.ExtractDecimalAndIntRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match a Unicode digit greedily at least once.
в—Ӣ Optional (greedy).
в—Ӣ Match '.'.
в—Ӣ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.

member.name: M:mymooo.core.Utils.Script.MymoooRegex.MathRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
math\\.(?:pi|[A-Za-z]+\\((?>[^()]+|(?<Open>\\()|(?<-Open>\\)))*(?(Open)(?!))\\))|round\\((?>[^()]+|(?<Open>\\()|(?<-Open>\\)))*(?(Open)(?!))\\)|max\\((?>[^()]+|(?<Open>\\()|(?<-Open>\\)))*(?(Open)(?!))\\)|min\\((?>[^()]+|(?<Open>\\()|(?<-Open>\\)))*(?(Open)(?!))\\)
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
в—Ӣ Match a sequence of expressions.
в—Ӣ Match 'm'.
в—Ӣ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
в—Ӣ Match a sequence of expressions.
в—Ӣ Match 'a'.
в—Ӣ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
в—Ӣ Match a sequence of expressions.
в—Ӣ Match the string "th.".
в—Ӣ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
в—Ӣ Match the string "pi".
в—Ӣ Match a sequence of expressions.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [A-Za-z] atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ Match '('.
в—Ӣ Loop greedily any number of times.
в—Ӣ Match with 3 alternative expressions, atomically.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [^()] atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match '('.
в—Ӣ Non-capturing balancing group. Uncaptures the "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.
в—Ӣ Conditionally match one of two expressions depending on whether the "Open" capture group matched.
в—Ӣ Matched: Fail to match.
в—Ӣ Not Matched: Match an empty string.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.
в—Ӣ Match a sequence of expressions.
в—Ӣ Match the string "x(".
в—Ӣ Loop greedily any number of times.
в—Ӣ Match with 3 alternative expressions, atomically.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [^()] atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match '('.
в—Ӣ Non-capturing balancing group. Uncaptures the "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.
в—Ӣ Conditionally match one of two expressions depending on whether the "Open" capture group matched.
в—Ӣ Matched: Fail to match.
в—Ӣ Not Matched: Match an empty string.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.
в—Ӣ Match a sequence of expressions.
в—Ӣ Match the string "in(".
в—Ӣ Loop greedily any number of times.
в—Ӣ Match with 3 alternative expressions, atomically.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [^()] atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match '('.
в—Ӣ Non-capturing balancing group. Uncaptures the "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.
в—Ӣ Conditionally match one of two expressions depending on whether the "Open" capture group matched.
в—Ӣ Matched: Fail to match.
в—Ӣ Not Matched: Match an empty string.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.
в—Ӣ Match a sequence of expressions.
в—Ӣ Match the string "round(".
в—Ӣ Loop greedily any number of times.
в—Ӣ Match with 3 alternative expressions, atomically.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [^()] atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match '('.
в—Ӣ Non-capturing balancing group. Uncaptures the "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.
в—Ӣ Conditionally match one of two expressions depending on whether the "Open" capture group matched.
в—Ӣ Matched: Fail to match.
в—Ӣ Not Matched: Match an empty string.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.

member.name: M:mymooo.core.Utils.Script.MymoooRegex.ReRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
re\\.(?:[A-Za-z]+\\((?>[^()]+|(?<Open>\\()|(?<-Open>\\)))*(?(Open)(?!))\\))
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match the string "re.".
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [A-Za-z] atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ Match '('.
в—Ӣ Loop greedily any number of times.
в—Ӣ Match with 3 alternative expressions, atomically.
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [^()] atomically at least once.
в—Ӣ "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match '('.
в—Ӣ Non-capturing balancing group. Uncaptures the "Open" capture group.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.
в—Ӣ Conditionally match one of two expressions depending on whether the "Open" capture group matched.
в—Ӣ Matched: Fail to match.
в—Ӣ Not Matched: Match an empty string.
в—Ӣ Match ')'.

member.returns: жҳҺж–Ү

member.name: M:com.mymooo.mall.core.Utils.JsonConverter.NameConverter._invisibleRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\s
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match a whitespace character.

member.name: M:com.mymooo.mall.core.Utils.JsonConverter.NameConverter._fullwidthRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[\\uff01-\\uff5e]
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [\uFF01-\uFF5E].

member.name: M:com.mymooo.mall.core.Utils.JsonConverter.ProductModelConverter._invisibleRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\s
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match a whitespace character.

member.name: M:com.mymooo.mall.core.Utils.JsonConverter.ProductModelConverter._fullwidthRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[\\uff01-\\uff5e]
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [\uFF01-\uFF5E].

member.name: M:com.mymooo.mall.core.Utils.JsonConverter.ProductModelConverter._productModelRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[\\w\\d-+*_./]+
Explanation:
в—Ӣ Match a character in the set [*+--/_\w\d] atomically at least once.

member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated._invisibleRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfAnyDigit(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a Unicode digit.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfAnyWhiteSpace(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a whitespace character.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfNonAsciiOrAny_0B08BC6BD06D31F38B4967EBF6B1840D738C0B4240B34621F35E22EE855F1EE4(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a character in the set [*+--/_\w\d].

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IsWordChar(System.Char)
member.summary: Determines whether the character is part of the [\w] set.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 1 value onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiExceptDigits
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "\0\u0001\u0002\u0003\u0004\u0005\u0006\a\b\t\n\v\f\r\u000e\u000f\u0010\u0011\u0012\u0013\u0014\u0015\u0016\u0017\u0018\u0019\u001a\u001b\u001c\u001d\u001e\u001f !\"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ[\\]^_`abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz{|}~\u007f".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiExceptWhiteSpace
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "\0\u0001\u0002\u0003\u0004\u0005\u0006\a\b\u000e\u000f\u0010\u0011\u0012\u0013\u0014\u0015\u0016\u0017\u0018\u0019\u001a\u001b\u001c\u001d\u001e\u001f!\"#$%&'()*+,-./0123456789:;<=>?@ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ[\\]^_`abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz{|}~\u007f".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiLetters
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_40FF030000000000000000
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in ".0123456789".
